# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User prefers the Sign In button to remain in the right-side auth area of the header, not in the centered navigation.
- Use square meters (m²) instead of square feet in property size UI text because the project targets South Africa.
- Use South African localization in UI content, including regional wording, units like m², and local context.
- Use South African Rand formatting for currency instead of dollar-sign currency symbols.
